title: Spicy German Beef Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew with tender beef, spicy undertones and classic German flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high.
Brown beef on all sides, about 5 minutes, then remove from pot.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add caraway seeds, allspice, salt, and pepper; cook 1 minute.
Add red wine and bring to a boil, scraping up browned bits.
Return beef to pot and add beef broth; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer 1 hour or until beef is tender.
Add spicy sausage and cook 15 minutes or until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
